topics.title: Talk Show Writers Strike and Concert Date
topics.summary: The studio discusses the impact of the writers' strike on talk shows like Ellen DeGeneres' while transitioning into a humorous review of a concert date involving Van Halen.

topics.title: Van Halen Concert and Relationship Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio explores the personal dynamics between Robin and Jim Florentine following their shared experience at a Van Halen concert.

topics.title: Script Discussions and Stalker Stories
topics.summary: The studio features a segment discussing personal relationships, the details of a stalker's obsession with Conan O'Brien, and the potential for producing a film based on one of Eric's scripts.

topics.title: Film Script Development and Puppy Mill Rescue
topics.summary: The studio discusses the production of a film starring Eric, including script requirements and potential casting, before transitioning to a discussion about a successful media campaign for a dog rescue organization.

topics.title: Radio Show Segments and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features discussions on upcoming musical performances, listener interactions regarding personal relationships, and a segment where Artie discusses his health concerns and dieting habits.

topics.title: Writer Strike and Studio Negotiations
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with writer Brian Koppelman regarding the nuances of the writers' strike, specifically focusing on how studios use uncertainty about new media revenue to negotiate lower residuals for creators.

topics.title: Writer Strike and Studio Negotiations
topics.summary: The show explores the economic struggles of writers in the entertainment industry, the complexities of contract negotiations regarding digital media, and the specific nuances of the Writers Guild of America strike.

topics.title: Model Interviews and Wrestling News
topics.summary: The show features interviews with models Joanna and Marta, who discuss their careers and upcoming appearances, followed by a segment on wrestling news regarding trademark disputes and celebrity name changes.

topics.title: Bob Levy's Health and Spelling Bee
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding Bob Levy's transition to new medication, his struggles with substance use, and a spelling bee competition between him and two women.

topics.title: Bob Levy's Medication and Personal Life
topics.summary: The show features Bob Levy discussing his transition away from alcohol, his use of clonazepam for health management, and various personal anecdotes regarding his living situation and recent performances.

topics.title: Scott the Engineer and Benji Conflict
topics.summary: The studio explores a tense confrontation between Scott, the show's engineer, and Benji over past financial favors and current professional dynamics.

topics.title: Workplace Dynamics and Guest Appearance
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding workplace attitudes, an upcoming tour with Bob Leavy, and a guest appearance by a former Marine.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio covers various topics including celebrity sightings, the death of Kanye West's mother following cosmetic surgery, J.K. Rowling's limited book release, and a discussion regarding the birth of Elizabeth Hasselbeck's son.

topics.title: Norman Mailer and Avant-Garde Music
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legacy of writer Norman Mailer, the production of new avant-garde music by a local band, and an anecdote regarding a porn star's appearance at a concert.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Box Office Reports
topics.summary: The studio reviews current film performances, celebrity news regarding pregnancy announcements, and the Hollywood writers' strike while discussing various pop culture topics.
